title: Bpfassh 3
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Bpfassh_system.jpg]] |name=Bpfassh 3 |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] |system=[[Bpfassh system/Legends|Bpfassh system]] |coordinates=M-19 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Bpfassh]] |position= |moons= |routes=[[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Defending fighters launching from the third moon. Nothing larger visible as yet.''"
"''Get a location on that fighter base, and detail the ''Inexorable'' to move in and destroy it.|A [[Tactical officer/Legends|tactical officer]] and [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]|''[[Heir to the Empire]]''}} '''Bpfassh 3''' was the third moon in the complicated system which orbited the planet [[Bpfassh]]. It contained a starfighter base, which was presumably destroyed by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. ==Behind the scenes== The moon was not named specifically in the only novel in which it appears. However, the tactical officer aboard the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] reported to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] that "... fighters [were] launching from the third moon." ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]] {{1stp}} ==Sources== *''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' {{Imo}} *{{CSWECite|I||Bpfassh}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bpfassh system locations]] [[Category:Moons in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Moons in the Trailing Sectors]]
